body:
### Your current environment
The output of python collect_env.py ```text Your output of `python collect_env.py` here ```
### Your code version
The commit id or version of vllm-omni ```text d365d3a6 ```
The commit id or version of vllm ```text 0.24.0 ```
### 🐛 Describe the bug For Qwen3-TTS (`task_type: Base`, in-context / voice-clone mode), setting `min_tokens` to 2 in the stage-0 (talker) `default_sampling_params` is required to align with the [qwen-tts](https://github.com/QwenLM/Qwen3-TTS/blob/022e286b98fbec7e1e916cb940cdf532cd9f488e/qwen_tts/core/models/modeling_qwen3_tts.py#L2046) package and also required for some finetuned checkpoints where the talker samples the codec EOS token on the first frame and the request returns empty audio (`HTTP 400 "TTS model did not produce audio output."`). However, setting any `min_tokens >= 1` on the talker stage makes the engine die on the first request with: ``` torch.AcceleratorError: CUDA error: device-side assert triggered ... vllm.v1.engine.exceptions.EngineDeadError: EngineCore encountered an issue. [Orchestrator] Stage-0 is dead ``` Root cause: vLLM's `MinTokensLogitsProcessor` masks the request's `all_stop_token_ids`, which unconditionally includes the **text tokenizer's EOS id** (`151645` for Qwen3-TTS). The talker samples over the **narrow codec vocabulary (3072 logits)**, so that id is out of range and the `index_put_` used to write `-inf` triggers a device-side assert. Suggested fixes - When constructing the talker-stage `SamplingParams`, do not fold the text tokenizer EOS into `all_stop_token_ids` — the talker's only valid stop is the codec EOS `2150` (already declared in `qwen3_tts/pipeline.py`). - Or clamp/intersect any `min_tokens` stop ids against `talker_config.vocab_size` in the qwen3-tts stage setup. ### Before submitting a new issue... - [x] Make sure you already searched for relevant issues, and asked the chatbot living at the bottom right corner of the [documentation page](https://vllm-omni.readthedocs.io), which can answer lots of frequently asked questions.
title: [Bug]: Qwen3-TTS: setting `min_tokens` in the talker stage crashes the engine with a CUDA device-side assert
